eligibility.label: Minimum personal net worth of $500,000 CAD
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Personal net worth ($${personalNetWorth}) is below the $500,000 minimum required

eligibility.label: Minimum $500,000 CAD investment in an Alberta farm operation
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Investment capacity ($${investmentCapacity}) is below the $500,000 minimum for farm stream

eligibility.label: Minimum 3 years of farm management experience
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Farm management experience does not meet the 3-year minimum
